MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for the Petitioner.

Mr. Campagnoli requested a three week continuance stating that the inventory was complete and that he was dealing with the one account that was in the trust. The matter was continued to July 9, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith and A. Santiago.
